case_title: SF HOUSING AUTHORITY vs. TURNER, JESSIE N. et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: LAFAYETTE, GARY TRACY SUBSTITUTED FOR KIMERLING, ALLYCE SUSAN AS ATTORNEY FOR HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A PUBLIC CORPORATION
